title: Termly Next Steps
description:
See: Re: Guild Garage - Website Hosting & change requests - SALES TEAM

John asked the following regarding Termly:

With regards to Termly, I need to get a better understanding of how the current implementation has been handled on the site.  We haven’t created any of the missing components (Disclaimer, Acceptable Use, Accessibility statements, etc.) because I couldn’t get anyone to provide details on how the integration is working currently (e.g. I sent multiple integration options, and no one could confirm which was used).  The integration dictates how updates work (e.g. HTML = no updates | Code/URL = updates).  There’s no cookie consent or Google consent currently.  We need to get DSAR implemented along with CCPA compliance.  I need to be able to confirm logging is working, especially for DSAR/CCPA, and confirm where/who requests are routing.  Lastly, we need to confirm ownership moving forward and confirm what brands Clixsy is managing.

Answers to John's questions:

1. Integration method currently in use on the GGG site Code snippet/URL method. Nothing is live on the site yet — the snippet has never been installed because GGG never provided it. 

2. Why missing components haven't been created John may have already built some or all of these in Termly. The call needs to surface what he already has vs. what still needs to be created. The agreed page set is likely: Disclaimer, Acceptable Use, Accessibility Statement, plus whatever "etc." means to him — probably Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy at minimum.

3. Cookie consent and Google consent Same answer as before — pending implementation. But if John already has these configured in Termly, they could move faster than expected once snippets are exchanged.

4. DSAR and CCPA compliance Not implemented. Same reason — nothing in Termly has been set up yet on GGG's side because John was stuck waiting on #1. 

5. Logging confirmation Can't confirm yet. Logging is configured inside GGG's Termly account. Once they build the pages and provide snippets, Clixsy installs them and can confirm the pages are live. But the routing destination and logging are GGG's to configure in their account. 

6. Ownership going forward GGG owns the Termly account. Clixsy owns the website implementation side. 

7. What brands Clixsy is managing 
  • guildgaragegroup.com
  • Gator Garage Door
  • Goody Garage Door
  • Gaithersburg Garage Door
  • Right Way Garage Door
  • Action Garage Doors
  • Garage Door Medics
, can you confirm the above is all accurate?

NEXT STEPS

  • Get John, Corey, Keith, Jess, and Sandi (optional) on a call to discuss Termly
  • Send an invite to book a meeting with Corey and Keith (sorry, Keith!). Include:
    • A Zoom scheduler link with you and Corey
    • A day Corey is free next week and the week after
    • A short message that lets him know if none of the listed times work, you are happy to see what we can shift around
  • Review the above with John and get aligned
  • When the Termly meeting takes place, recap the email in a separate email thread with John and Sandi

title: Replace the Current Raynor Logo on Brands Page
description:
Domain: guildgaragegroup.com


Primary URL: guildgaragegroup.com/brands/


Please update the current Raynor logo on the Guild Garage Group Brands page be replaced with a new updated version. The new logo has been provided as an attachment.


Client Goal: Replace the outdated Raynor logo on the Brands page with the updated version provided by client.


Requirements for Completion:

  • Current Raynor logo on guildgaragegroup.com/brands/ is replaced with the new logo provided
  • New Raynor logo displays correctly and is sized consistently with other brand logos on the page


Deadline: No deadline stated.


Priority: LOW — Cosmetic brand asset update with no functional urgency. Standard queue within 2 business days.


Assets and References:

  • New Raynor logo attached below

title: Fix Logo Distortion on Mobile
description:
Domain: guildgaragegroup.com

Primary URL: guildgaragegroup.com (mobile)


The client has flagged that the Guild Garage Group logo is displaying with distortion on the mobile version of the website. This needs to be identified and resolved so the logo displays correctly across all mobile screen sizes.


Client Goal: Fix the logo distortion on the mobile version of guildgaragegroup.com so it displays correctly and proportionally.


Requirements for Completion:


  • Root cause of the mobile logo distortion is identified
  • Logo displays correctly and proportionally across all mobile screen sizes following the fix
  • No other mobile layout elements are affected by the change


Deadline: No deadline stated.


Priority: MEDIUM — Visible issue affecting how the site presents to all mobile visitors. Should be resolved by end of next business day.


Example screenshot of the brand distortion:

title: Website Issues
description:
SEE: Re: Guild Garage - Website Hosting & change requests - SALES TEAM

John flagged that the website has an unresolved issue. When Jessica followed up on Apr 21 noting the site looked fine and the problem appeared to have sorted itself out, John responded that the problem was not sorted and that no one took the time to ask what the actual issue was before assuming it was resolved. 

The specific website problem has not been clearly identified yet. Jessica has asked John to describe it in more detail and we are waiting on his response. 

NEXT STEPS 
  • Wait for John's reply describing the website issue in detail before taking any action
  • A ticket needs to be created once the issue is defined
  • Jessica to keep John updated and not close or assume resolution until John explicitly confirms the issue is fixed
NOTE TO JESS: If John responds and is still digging into the Termly stuff, let me know, and we'll figure out a response.

title: Add Location Pins to Interactive Map
description:
Primary URL: https://guildgaragegroup.com/brands/

Summary: The client is requesting that Garage Door Medics, a franchise under Guild Garage Group, be added to the interactive map on the Brands page in two locations. There are two separate additions needed — one for San Diego, CA and one for DFW, Texas.

Client Goal: Garage Door Medics appears as a pin/blip on the Brands page map for both the San Diego, CA and DFW, Texas locations.

Requirements for Completion:
  • Garage Door Medics is added as a map pin/blip in San Diego, CA on the Brands page map
  • Garage Door Medics is added as a map pin/blip in DFW, Texas on the Brands page map
Deadline: No deadline provided by the client.
